title: XFEM — extended finite element for cracks Mismatch-Only Spec

E.forward: u_h = sum N_i u_i + sum N_j (H(x) - H_j) a_j + sum N_k F_l(x) b_kl (crack-tip enrichment)
E.inverse: solve forward for declared state variable under Omega bounds

d_spec_notes: Distance computed from problem_class, forward_operator, carrier, integration_axis against neighboring specs; within same principle this spec is mismatch-only canonical and sits at the Omega centroid.

s1_s4_justifications.S1: Dimensions are consistent across the DAG; forward operator maps state space to measurement space at declared shapes.
s1_s4_justifications.S2: kappa_eff = 18 within tolerance after regularization; RIP-like or coercivity conditions satisfied over most of Omega.
s1_s4_justifications.S3: Solvers converge at rate q=2.0 in well-posed regime; mismatch parameters degrade convergence but not divergence.
s1_s4_justifications.S4: epsilon_fn evaluates across 10+ random Omega samples; hardness rule verified — no baseline passes everywhere.
